subcodes.first_line: Glorified art Thou, O my God! Thou beholdest Thy chosen servants in the hands of the wicked ones who have disbelieved in Thee and Thy signs [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: سبحانک یا الهی تری عبادک الاصفیاء بین ایدی الاشقیاء الذین کفروا بک و بایاتک
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @prayer for nearness to God, @presence of; reunion with God, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
